text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Summer has ended. To sum it up, I<n>would say...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! It was the Summer<n>of the
Overlord's Awakening!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa... Our dealings were<n>very much
worth my time.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her, I have been freed from<n>the cursed
burden of overwhelming<n>victory.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes! I no longer fear chaos and<n>disorder!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will sift through the dirt and grime so<n>that I may
find a truly beautiful<n>gemstone hidden beneath.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Be I the hunter or the hunted, I will<n>stride boldly
down the center of my<n>path and rout those who
challenge<n>me. Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The way forward is revealed. From<n>here on, T.M.
Opera O will assert not<n>only her brilliance...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She'll walk the path of dominance as<n>the Overlord,
with beauty and strength<n>to match her pride.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am no longer the Overlord in the<n>simplest sense.
No...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I want to be an overlord who thrives<n>on the
razor's edge! A narrow margin<n>will suffice for it is
my friend!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, Trainer. I require a new title.
choice_data_list: Oh! Uh, sure. Um, uhh... The Edgelord?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaa ha ha! Indeed, for I do always<n>stand at the
precipice!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The thrill of knowing a single misstep<n>will send me
tumbling...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I cannot help but feel a more<n>appropriate
title remains out there...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes—in the Japan Cup, I shall<n>demonstrate to all
that I'm the<n>Overlord of Ultimate Power!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Opera O turns her back and struts<n>away.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In that moment, I could swear the<n>word "Centurial"
had appeared<n>across her back.
